appraisal_events.evidence: « Cela me serait en effet très désagréable. Mais comme je la connais de vue je me lèverai à temps. » / « Je n'éprouve aucun besoin de m'en assurer par moi-même. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The duchess announces that she will actively avoid the meeting and refuses the other interlocutor’s recommendation, marking a clear social exclusion of Odette. The fact that Mme de Villeparisis immediately changes the subject reinforces the scope of the snub.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Odette is explicitly kept at a distance and refused, which constitutes a clear social exclusion.
The duchess imposes her will (refusal of the meeting), and the others submit to it, which manifests a local conversational authority.
